description: Raised pale border / low surrounding ground border (1 block high) matching footprint outline; footprint interior will be inset by 1 from this border.

operations.purpose: Raised pale border / low surrounding ground border (1 block high) matching footprint outline; footprint interior will be inset by 1 from this border.
Interior floor layer (wood planks) one block above ground border to create a raised floor.
Wooden skirting visible at base around interior footprint (extends to ground level inside border).
Main sandstone walls from one block above floor up to wall height (3 blocks high).
Continuous pale band under the roof (thin trim) using sandstone_slab to differentiate from quartz border.
Inset short parapet (solid) aligned under slab trim to give a visible white-ish band (complements quartz).
Continuous horizontal window (3 panes long) centered on north long side at middle wall height (north side).
Second continuous horizontal window segment on north long side separated from corner by pillar and 1 block sandstone.
Continuous horizontal window (3 panes long) centered on south long side.
Second window segment on south long side.
Continuous horizontal window on west short side (3 panes long across short side) centered vertically.
Continuous horizontal window on east short side.
Entrance opening on north face centered along long axis: 2 blocks tall doorway (from floor y=1 to y=2) plus headspace cleared at y=3.
Top roof ridge layer using brick to form the highest center ridge (single-block ridge spanning full length).
Primary gable roof layer - stepped toward center from the top of walls; this establishes the upper roof slab below ridge.
Stepped gable edge on north slope using brick stairs for slope profile (north row).
